items.name: AppAdapter
items.doc:
Adapter layer between host app and Slint UI window.
Owns AppWindow handle, ViewConfig registry, menu actions, and navigation state.

items.name: new
items.doc: Create a new adapter, initializing the Slint window and wiring event dispatch.

items.name: apply_dsl
items.doc: Apply a validated `AppDsl` — composition rules already enforced.

items.name: load_view_configs
items.signature: pub fn load_view_configs(&self, dir: &Path) -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>>
items.doc:
Load all `*.rhai` files from `dir` and register as per-view configs.
Auto-applied by the navigate handler on every nav event.

items.name: set_window_size
items.signature: pub fn set_window_size(&self, width: u32, height: u32)

items.name: set_bg_style_str
items.doc: Set the OS-level backdrop style ("mica" | "acrylic" | anything else → solid).

items.name: on_navigate
items.signature: pub fn on_navigate(&self, f: impl Fn(slint::SharedString) + 'static)
items.doc:
Register a handler for the navigate callback (nav item clicked).
Replaces any previously registered handler.

items.name: on_toolbar_clicked
items.signature: pub fn on_toolbar_clicked(&self, f: impl Fn(slint::SharedString) + 'static)
items.doc: Register a handler for toolbar button clicks.

items.name: on_menu_action
items.signature: pub fn on_menu_action(&self, id: impl Into<String>, f: impl Fn() + 'static)
items.doc:
Register a handler for a specific MenuBar action id.
Multiple calls accumulate — each id maps to one handler.

items.name: apply_settings
items.doc: Apply settings to the Slint UI (zoom, theme, icons, font).

items.name: apply_theme
items.doc: Sync UI theme with OS dark mode preference.

items.name: apply_grid
items.signature: pub fn apply_grid(&self, path: &Path) -> Result<(), Box<dyn std::error::Error>>
items.doc: Load grid layout from config file and apply row ratios.

items.name: set_active_view
items.doc: Switch the active view by name.

items.name: get_active_view
items.doc: Get the currently active view name.

items.name: set_dark_mode
items.doc: Set dark mode on/off (true = dark, false = light).

items.name: get_dark_mode
items.doc: Check if dark mode is currently active.

items.name: run
items.doc: Show window and apply OS-level backdrop effects, then enter event loop.
